name: elevator_ctrl
interface: module elevator_ctrl (input clk, input rst_n, input [1:0] target, output reg [1:0] floor, output reg door);
golden_rtl:
module elevator_ctrl(input clk,input rst_n,input [1:0] target,
                     output reg [1:0] floor,output reg door);
 always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
  if(!rst_n) begin floor<=1; door<=0; end
  else begin
   if(target>=1 && target<=3) begin
    if(floor<target) begin floor<=floor+1; door<=0; end
    else if(floor>target) begin floor<=floor-1; door<=0; end
    else begin floor<=floor; door<=1; end
   end else begin door<=0; end
  end
 end
endmodule
buggy_rtl:
module elevator_ctrl(input clk,input rst_n,input [1:0] target,
                     output reg [1:0] floor,output reg door);
 always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
  if(!rst_n) begin floor<=1; door<=0; end
  else begin
   if(target>=1 && target<=3) begin
    if(floor<target) begin floor<=floor+1; door<=0; end
    else if(floor>target) begin floor<=floor-1; door<=0; end
    else begin floor<=floor; door<=0; end
   end else begin door<=0; end
  end
 end
endmodule
